The '''Ambush on Yitheeth''' was a skirmish between the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] on the oceanic moon of [[Yitheeth]].

==Background==
Having evaded enemy [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] [[Yinchorri starfighter|fighters]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] landed on the ocean moon. There, the [[Aleena/Legends|Aleena]] [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]] and the [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Theen Fida]] had a bath in the surrounding oceans. Having finished doing so, the four Jedi left for a nearby settlement on a speeder provided with the cruiser to continue with their mission of looking for a hidden Yinchorri high command.

==The skirmish==
[[File:Villie_Yitheeth.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Olmar Grahrk]] captured by [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]].]]

Having arrived, the Jedi planned to pose as traders selling parts for the new [[T-21 hyper particle exchange chamber]], which turned out to be entirely made up by Adi Gallia. Soon, they were under attack by a group of Yinchorr under the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Olmar Grahrk]]. However, the Jedi fought back valiantly and defeated their Yinchorri attackers. They then took Grahrk captive, whom told them that the Yinchorri high command was not on Yitheeth. Gallia then decided to leave for nearby [[Yibikkoror]] to aid fellow Masters [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] and [[Micah Giiett]], who were also under attack.
